    MedicalSite - Class in model
    Abstract parent class for medical sites displayed on the map.

    MedicalStaff - Class in model
    Represents a doctor or medical staff member using the platform.

    Mission - Class in model
    Represents an actual drone delivery mission.

    Represents the status of a delivery mission.
